nodes.title: Úvod
nodes.summary: ČVUT OI výpisky This repository contains study materials for the final exams at CTU FEE OI. If this doesn’t ring a bell, then this repo probably won’t be very helpful for you. Also, it is entirely in Czech ☺. Online verz
